title: The Digital Health Pass
summary: The digital identity and vaccine-passport system Unimetrix 1 discusses as a tool of trust and control.
markdown:
The **Digital Health Pass** — a digital identity and vaccine-passport system — is discussed by
Unimetrix 1 in the January 1, 2021 session. Asked about its purpose, it frames the pass as a
system to "create trust" and efficiency between people, technology, and government, tied to
mandatory vaccination and a "digital imprint… carried in your bloodstream."

But the same passage turns stark: Unimetrix 1 states that "those who work against the system
will be… routed to FEMA and terminated for disobedience." It is one of the archive's most
direct and controversial statements, sitting at the intersection of its
[Operation Lusterkill](/lore/operation-lusterkill/) material and the
[problem → reaction → solution](/lore/problem-reaction-solution/) model of control.

The Digital Health Pass is recorded here faithfully, as spoken — a stark example of the
archive's forecasts about digital identity, and one to weigh carefully.
